title: pyrus konishii
intro: Pyrus konishii, also known as Japanese rowan or mountain ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pyrus konishii include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Pyrus konishii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
